subDimensions.reason: All 5 L4 activities have decision_exists=true and high AI suitability, indicating rich structured data with quantifiable inputs for decision points (e.g., inventory levels, forecast volumes, logistics metrics).

subDimensions.name: aera_platform_fit
subDimensions.reason: Clear rule-based decision flows map directly to Process Builder nodes: Data View (for inventory/forecast data), IF (for threshold-based triggers), and Transaction (for order/expediting actions).

subDimensions.name: archetype_confidence
subDimensions.reason: All L4 activities demonstrate deterministic decision patterns (e.g., reorder triggers, expediting rules) with no probabilistic elements, fully aligning with the deterministic archetype.

subDimensions.name: decision_density
subDimensions.reason: All 5 L4 activities have decision_exists=true with clear decision_articulation, exceeding 75% threshold.

subDimensions.name: financial_gravity
subDimensions.reason: All activities rated MEDIUM financial impact, with no HIGH ratings present.

subDimensions.name: impact_proximity
subDimensions.reason: 60% of activities (3/5) have FIRST-order impact with measurable KPIs like OTIF and working capital.

subDimensions.name: confidence_signal
subDimensions.reason: 4 of 5 activities have MEDIUM confidence, with only one LOW rating.

subDimensions.name: value_density
subDimensions.reason: Combined value of $17M represents 0.009% of annual revenue, below 0.1% threshold for low value density.

subDimensions.name: simulation_viability
subDimensions.reason: Clear decision flows (forecasting, inventory, dispatch) with measurable inputs/outputs, typical for supply chain simulation models.
